hero.headline: Your next step: 60 minutes that change how you understand your body.
hero.subheadline: Book your Gut & Metabolic Foundation Assessment with Jeanne Doherty, MS, RD, LDN. Your first session is a comprehensive 60-minute evaluation of your health history, current symptoms, lab work, and goals — so you leave with a clear understanding of what's been driving your symptoms and a concrete plan to address it.

bookOnline.headline: Book Online
bookOnline.body: Select a time that works for you. In-person or virtual appointments available.

call.headline: Call
call.body: Prefer to talk first? Call during office hours and we'll walk you through what to expect, verify your insurance, and find a time that works.

emailSection.headline: Email
emailSection.body: Have questions before booking? Send an email and we'll respond within one business day.

items.label: Before your appointment
items.text: You'll receive intake forms to complete at your own pace, including health history and current medications.

items.label: At your appointment
items.text: 60 minutes, one-on-one with Jeanne. Bring your recent lab work, insurance card, and any questions.

items.label: After your appointment
items.text: You'll leave with a clear assessment, initial recommendations, and a plan for next steps.

location.headline: Our Location
location.note: Located in the Bethesda Place professional building. Free parking available.

insuranceQuickCheck.headline: Not sure if your insurance covers it?
insuranceQuickCheck.body: Call or visit our Insurance & Pricing page to verify your coverage before booking.
insuranceQuickCheck.triggers: Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna & Medicare accepted  ·  60-minute sessions  ·  Same practitioner every visit  ·  In-person or virtual
